_comment: Gateway scorecard snapshot. Scores ★1-5 per the rubric in BENCHMARKS.md. markup = gateway fee on top of provider token cost. self_hosted: compliance/security burden is the operator's; score reflects controls the software provides. Verify live certs before an audit. observability: 5-pillar evidence rubric (metrics export / OTel traces / per-key token+cost attribution / log export / dashboard) — see BENCHMARKS.md Part 4 rubric + Part 6; evidence per gateway in observability_note (docs reviewed 2026-07-06).

gateways.name: Cloudflare AI Gateway
gateways.observability_note: All 5 pillars: GraphQL analytics + native OTLP trace export + per-request cost + Logpush + dashboard.
gateways.note: SOC 2 II / ISO 27001 / PCI / GDPR; free DLP+PII scan, guardrails, fallback; 100% SLA at Business+.

gateways.name: Portkey (cloud)
gateways.observability_note: All 5 pillars: 21+ metrics, native traces (OTel ingest), per-key cost/budgets, full logging (JSONL export enterprise), dashboard.
gateways.note: SOC 2 II + ISO 27001 + HIPAA + GDPR; 50+ guardrail marketplace, RBAC, SSO, key vault; 99.99% SLA.

gateways.name: Vercel AI Gateway
gateways.observability_note: Dashboard metrics + per-request cost by key/project; no gateway-side OTel export (AI-SDK telemetry is app-side), no log drain.
gateways.note: SOC 2 II + 99.99% SLA (Enterprise); true 0% markup incl. BYOK; ZDR option.

gateways.name: Helicone (cloud)
gateways.observability_note: Observability IS the product: cost/users/sessions, query API + webhooks; session traces via headers, no OTel export.
gateways.note: SOC 2 + HIPAA (Team $799/mo); PII detection, prompt-injection; OSS core enables VPC/self-host.

gateways.name: Requesty
gateways.observability_note: Console analytics + per-key cost breakdowns + CSV/PDF export; no OTel, no log-export integrations documented.
gateways.note: EU residency (Frankfurt) + PII masking + ZDR; SOC 2 Type II still in progress — official security page still shows 'expected Q2 2026', now overdue (re-checked 2026-07-03); not yet Type II.

gateways.name: OpenRouter
gateways.observability_note: Usage+cost in responses, per-key limits; Broadcast exports logs/traces to OTel/Datadog/S3/webhooks; no Prometheus.
gateways.note: ~90 providers (live API count 2026-07-06), auto-failover, free ZDR, EU region-lock; SOC 2 Type II UNVERIFIED; no public SLA outside enterprise.

gateways.name: Eden AI
gateways.observability_note: Cost per response + consumption API filterable by key/user + dashboard; no tracing or log export documented.
gateways.note: France-based, EU-default residency, GDPR-first, no-training; SOC 2 status UNVERIFIED; 99.99% self-reported.

gateways.name: Martian
gateways.observability_note: Dashboard usage/perf stats + token usage in responses; no per-key attribution, tracing or export documented.
gateways.note: Airlock model-compliance vetting + cost routing; SOC 2/ISO details UNVERIFIED.

gateways.name: Azure OpenAI
gateways.observability_note: Azure Monitor metrics (tokens/TTFT/PTU) + diagnostic logs + APIM per-consumer token metrics + workbooks; OTel needs SDK-side setup.
gateways.note: SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / HIPAA-BAA / FedRAMP High; region pinning, ZDR-eligible endpoints; single-vendor.

gateways.name: AWS Bedrock
gateways.observability_note: CloudWatch metrics + model-invocation logging (full bodies, off by default) + gen-AI dashboard; cost attribution via inference profiles/tags (daily grain).
gateways.note: ISO / SOC / CSA STAR L2 / GDPR / HIPAA / FedRAMP High; ZDR config; multi-model within Bedrock; ~99.9% SLA.

gateways.name: Google Vertex AI
gateways.observability_note: Cloud Monitoring metrics + request-response logging to BigQuery + console dashboard; per-key cost attribution not documented.
gateways.note: First GenAI platform to FedRAMP High (2025); SOC 2 / ISO / HIPAA-BAA; ZDR config; GCP SLA.

gateways.name: OpenAI (direct)
gateways.observability_note: Usage/Costs APIs group by project/user/API-key + dashboard; logs only with store=true; traces only for Agents SDK.
gateways.note: SOC 2 II, GDPR, HIPAA-BAA, ZDR endpoints; single-vendor = no cross-provider failover; historically incident-prone.

gateways.name: Portkey Gateway (OSS)
gateways.observability_note: v1.15.x stable ships near-zero observability; Prometheus/OTLP/logs land in the unreleased 2.0 branch; analytics UI is the hosted control plane.
gateways.note: Apache-2.0 (Gateway 2.0); guardrails, circuit breakers, MCP OAuth 2.1, fallbacks free to self-hosters; <1ms overhead.

gateways.name: Kong AI Gateway
gateways.observability_note: Prometheus ai_* token/cost metrics + log serializer + Grafana templates (OSS ≤3.9); gen_ai.* spans and consumer-label cost are Enterprise 3.11+.
gateways.note: PII sanitization (20+ categories, 12 langs), AI Prompt Guard, Model Armor guardrails, RBAC; Enterprise carries Kong certs.

gateways.name: Envoy AI Gateway
gateways.observability_note: OTel GenAI-semconv metrics (tokens/TTFT/TPOT) + native OTLP traces + CEL llmRequestCosts per tenant + JSON access logs; no UI.
gateways.note: Built on Envoy; multi-provider routing + MCP gateway w/ OAuth + CEL authz; native K8s/Istio; no semantic cache/budgets.

gateways.name: Bifrost (Maxim)
gateways.observability_note: All 5 pillars: native Prometheus /metrics + OTLP traces (GenAI semconv) + per-key cost/budgets + structured logs + built-in UI.
gateways.note: Go; ~11µs overhead at 5k RPS (vendor benchmark), adaptive LB, cluster mode, 1000+ models; no known CVEs.

gateways.name: TensorZero
gateways.observability_note: Prometheus + OTLP traces + full inference logging in your ClickHouse + UI; per-key attribution partial. Archived Jun 2026 — frozen, not evolving.
gateways.note: Rust; <1ms p99 at 10k+ QPS; routing/retries/fallbacks, schema enforcement, built-in observability. ⚠️ ARCHIVED 2026-06 — repo unmaintained; Apache-2.0 forks only.

gateways.name: Higress
gateways.observability_note: Prometheus + ai-statistics per-consumer token metrics + OTel/SkyWalking traces + ai_log export + console AI dashboard; money-cost not computed.
gateways.note: Istio/Envoy AI-native gateway, Wasm plugins (Go/Rust/JS), console; Alibaba-backed, active.

gateways.name: Apache APISIX
gateways.observability_note: Prometheus apisix_llm_* token/latency metrics + OTel spans + LLM access-log export; no cost/billing layer, no bundled UI.
gateways.note: ai-proxy / ai-rate-limiting / ai-prompt-guard plugins on mature ASF gateway; no semantic cache / virtual-key budgets / MCP.

gateways.name: LiteLLM
gateways.observability_note: All 5 pillars: /metrics with per-key/team labels + OTLP traces + spend logs/budgets per key/team/tag + Langfuse/Datadog/S3 export + usage UI.
gateways.note: SOC 2 I + ISO (Enterprise); 2 serious 2026 CVEs both fixed in v1.83.7-stable — patch promptly. Weekly releases, healthy.

gateways.name: GPT-Load
gateways.observability_note: Built-in UI with request stats/history only; no token/cost accounting, no Prometheus/OTel, no export.
gateways.note: Go, MIT, ~6.2k★, v1.4.8 (May 2026); key-pool rotation + encrypted key store + dual auth; proxy-level, not full governance.

gateways.name: new-api
gateways.observability_note: Per-request cost accounting + quotas + stats dashboard in the admin UI; no Prometheus/OTel or external log export documented.
gateways.note: ~38k★, active, but cluster of 2026 CVEs; sandbox, restrict egress, patch aggressively.

gateways.name: one-api
gateways.observability_note: Token quotas + usage logs table (separate DB supported) in admin UI; no metrics/tracing/export; analytics charts not documented.
gateways.note: MIT original; maintenance slowed vs forks — new-api is the more active successor. Audit before prod.
